'''kahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jungleward|jungleward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jungleward|jungleward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kahate|kahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kahatesher|kahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kahatesherĂ«m|kahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kahatero|kahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kahateshĂ«|kahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kahateshĂ«m|kahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikahatero|gokikahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikahateshĂ«|gokikahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikahateshĂ«m|gokikahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokahankerom|gokahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokahankeshĂ«|gokahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokahankeshĂ«m|gokahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokahankeya|gokahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kahaterom|kahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kahatemu|kahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kahateya|kahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikahaterom|gokikahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikahatemu|gokikahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikahateya|gokikahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kahahate|kahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kahahatesher|kahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kahahatesherĂ«m|kahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kahahatero|kahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kahahateshĂ«|kahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kahahateshĂ«m|kahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikahahatero|gokikahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikahahateshĂ«|gokikahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikahahateshĂ«m|gokikahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokahahankerom|gokahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokahahankeshĂ«|gokahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokahahankeshĂ«m|gokahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokahahankeya|gokahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kahahaterom|kahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kahahatemu|kahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kahahateya|kahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikahahaterom|gokikahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikahahatemu|gokikahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikahahateya|gokikahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠhĂŠte|kĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠhĂŠtesher|kĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠhĂŠtero|kĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠhĂŠtero|gokikĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠhĂŠterom|kĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠhĂŠtemu|kĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠhĂŠteya|kĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠhĂŠterom|gokikĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠhĂŠteya|gokikĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafhafte|kafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafhaftesher|kafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafhaftesherĂ«m|kafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafhaftero|kafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafhafteshĂ«|kafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafhafteshĂ«m|kafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafhaftero|gokikafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafhafteshĂ«|gokikafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafhafteshĂ«m|gokikafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafhafnkerom|gokafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafhafnkeshĂ«|gokafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafhafnkeshĂ«m|gokafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafhafnkeya|gokafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafhafterom|kafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafhaftemu|kafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafhafteya|kafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafhafterom|gokikafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafhaftemu|gokikafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafhafteya|gokikafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
